zh.Clontarf, Dublin, Ireland: 愛爾蘭庫迪 度布林可隆塔福
zh.lifeSummary: 當Thorfin Sigurdson Earl of Orkney於1001年出生時，他的父親Earl of Orkney Sigurd Hlodvirsson "The Stout"36歲，母親Olith ingen Maíl Coluim meic Cináeda19歲。他於大約1038年與Ingebjørg Finnsdotter結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1064年享年63歲。

zh-hans.Clontarf, Dublin, Ireland: 爱尔兰庫迪 度布林可隆塔福
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thorfin Sigurdson Earl of Orkney于1001年出生时，他的父亲Earl of Orkney Sigurd Hlodvirsson "The Stout"36岁，母亲Olith ingen Maíl Coluim meic Cináeda19岁。他于大约1038年与Ingebjørg Finnsdotter结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1064年享年63岁。

nameMeanings.name: Sigurdson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erik, Arni, Bjorn, Sig.
Americanized form (and a very rare Swedish variant) of Swedish Sigurdsson: patronymic from the personal name Sigurd, Old Norse Sigurthr, composed of the elements sig ‘victory’ + varthr ‘guardian’.
Americanized form of Norwegian Sigurdsen, a cognate of 1 above.

en.lifeSummary: When Thorfin Sigurdson Earl of Orkney was born in 1001, his father, Earl of Orkney Sigurd Hlodvirsson "The Stout", was 36 and his mother, Olith ingen Maíl Coluim meic Cináeda, was 19. He married Ingebjørg Finnsdotter about 1038. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died in 1064, at the age of 63.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thorfin Sigurdson Earl of Orkney est né en 1001, son père, Earl of Orkney Sigurd Hlodvirsson "The Stout", avait 36 ans et sa mère, Olith ingen Maíl Coluim meic Cináeda, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Ingebjørg Finnsdotter environ 1038. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé en 1064, à l’âge de 63 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thorfin Sigurdson Earl of Orkney 1001 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Earl of Orkney Sigurd Hlodvirsson "The Stout" 36 und seine Mutter Olith ingen Maíl Coluim meic Cináeda 19. Er hat um 1038 Ingebjørg Finnsdotter geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb 1064 im Alter von 63 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thorfin Sigurdson Earl of Orkney è nato il nel 1001, il suo padre, Earl of Orkney Sigurd Hlodvirsson "The Stout", aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Olith ingen Maíl Coluim meic Cináeda, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Ingebjørg Finnsdotter circa 1038. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì nel 1064, all'età di 63 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Thorfin Sigurdson Earl of Orkneyが1001年に生まれた時，父Earl of Orkney Sigurd Hlodvirsson "The Stout"は36歳，母Olith ingen Maíl Coluim meic Cináedaは19歳であった。約1038年にIngebjørg Finnsdotterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1064年に63歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thorfin Sigurdson Earl of Orkney(이)가 1001년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Earl of Orkney Sigurd Hlodvirsson "The Stout"(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Olith ingen Maíl Coluim meic Cináeda(은)는 19세였다. 그는 대략 1038년 Ingebjørg Finnsdotter(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1064년 63세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thorfin Sigurdson Earl of Orkney nasceu em 1001, seu pai, Earl of Orkney Sigurd Hlodvirsson "The Stout", tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Olith ingen Maíl Coluim meic Cináeda, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Ingebjørg Finnsdotter aproximadamente 1038. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1064, com 63 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thorfin Sigurdson Earl of Orkney родился в 1001 г., его отцу по имени Earl of Orkney Sigurd Hlodvirsson "The Stout" было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Olith ingen Maíl Coluim meic Cináeda, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Ingebjørg Finnsdotter около 1038 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер в 1064 г. в возрасте 63 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thorfin Sigurdson Earl of Orkney nació en 1001, su papá, Earl of Orkney Sigurd Hlodvirsson "The Stout", tenía 36 años y su mamá, Olith ingen Maíl Coluim meic Cináeda, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Ingebjørg Finnsdotter aproximadamente 1038. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió en 1064, a la edad de 63 años.
